title: producer_champion apply-audit artifact (v1)
description: FROZEN contract for config/apply_audit/producer_champion/{date}.json (+ latest.json mirror) — produced by crucible-backtester optimizer/champion_promotion.py at the end of EVERY weekly Evaluator run, mirroring the config#1841 config/apply_audit/ per-optimizer pattern (see contracts/apply_audit.schema.json / optimizer/apply_audit.py). Written REGARDLESS of outcome (promoted / demoted / held-for-any-reason / error) — the config#2054 lesson is binding: a pointer-writer's liveness must be provable from day one, so this weekly write IS the liveness/freshness proxy for the champion-promotion engine (a held week correctly does not touch config/producer_champion.json, so pointer mtime alone cannot prove the engine is alive). Additive-only evolution: consumers MUST tolerate unknown extra fields; renames/removals require a schema_version bump.

date.description: Evaluator run date (trading-day normalized) — matches the dated S3 key.

outcome.description: promoted/demoted = the pointer was moved this run (champion_before != champion_after). held_insufficient_data = challenger has fewer than the configured minimum matured FORWARD cohorts. held_cooldown = the stat gates passed but fewer than the configured cooldown weeks have elapsed since the last pointer move. held_not_significant = matured cohorts sufficient but the HAC/Newey-West-adjusted overlap-aware significance gate and/or the 2-consecutive-week hysteresis gate did not clear. error = the engine could not complete evaluation this run (e.g. leaderboard artifact missing/malformed) — the failure also surfaces via the pipeline's completeness tracker; this record is the durable trace.

champion_before.description: The pointer's champion value read at the start of this evaluation (or the pre-bootstrap default 'agentic' when no pointer has ever been written). Null only on outcome='error' when evaluation aborted before the pointer could even be read (e.g. the leaderboard artifact itself was unavailable).

champion_after.description: The pointer's champion value at the end of this evaluation. Equal to champion_before on every held_*/error outcome — this artifact records a held week without ever mutating config/producer_champion.json. Null only alongside a null champion_before (outcome='error', pointer never read).

challenger_matured_cohorts.description: Count of matured FORWARD weekly cohorts available for the challenger arm (the arm that is NOT champion_before) as of this run — gate (a) in config#2367. A cohort is 'matured' once its 21d forward return has resolved.

sn_lift_vs_champion.description: Challenger's sector-neutral 21d mean-alpha lift over the champion arm, from the HAC/Newey-West-adjusted overlap-aware test this run. Null when challenger_matured_cohorts is below the minimum (no lift estimate was computed).

consecutive_wins.description: Hysteresis counter (gate c): consecutive weekly evaluations (including this one) where the challenger cleared the significance gate over the champion in the SAME direction. Carry-forward from the prior latest.json, reset to 0 whenever the sign of the leading arm flips or the significance gate fails. A pointer move requires this to reach 2.

cooldown_until.description: Date (trading-day) before which no further pointer move is permitted (gate e: >= 2 weeks after the last promote/demote). Carried forward unchanged from the prior record until a new pointer move resets it. Null before the first-ever pointer move.

blocked_by.description: Stable slugs naming the gate(s) that held the pointer this run: insufficient_matured_cohorts (gate a), cooldown_active (gate e), not_significant_hac_adjusted (gate b), hysteresis_not_satisfied (gate c — stat gate passed this week but not for 2 consecutive weeks yet), frozen (--freeze flag suppressed the write even though gates cleared), leaderboard_unavailable / unclassified_error (outcome=error). Non-null only on held_*/error outcomes; null on promoted/demoted.

challenger.description: Which arm was evaluated as the challenger this run (the complement of champion_before under the current two-arm VALID_CHAMPIONS set).

freeze.description: Whether this run was invoked with --freeze. When true, the pointer write is always suppressed regardless of gate outcome (this record is still written unconditionally).
